changeSet.author: camunda
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX ${prefix}IDX_PROCESS_INSTANCE_STATE_ACTIVE ON ${prefix}PROCESS_INSTANCE (CASE WHEN STATE = 'ACTIVE' THEN STATE END)

changeSet.author: camunda
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX ${prefix}IDX_PROCESS_INSTANCE_HAS_INCIDENT ON ${prefix}PROCESS_INSTANCE (CASE WHEN NUM_INCIDENTS > 0 THEN NUM_INCIDENTS END)

changeSet.author: camunda
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX ${prefix}IDX_FNI_STATE_ACTIVE ON ${prefix}FLOW_NODE_INSTANCE (CASE WHEN STATE = 'ACTIVE' THEN STATE END)

changeSet.author: camunda
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX ${prefix}IDX_INCIDENT_STATE_ACTIVE ON ${prefix}INCIDENT (CASE WHEN STATE = 'ACTIVE' THEN STATE END)

changeSet.author: camunda
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX ${prefix}IDX_AUDIT_LOG_UT_KEY ON ${prefix}AUDIT_LOG (USER_TASK_KEY) WHERE USER_TASK_KEY IS NOT NULL
